# Obligatory Java Hello World Current Version Update

## Purpose

Apply the smallest possible change set required to keep the Java hello-world project on the current supported Java baseline.

## Mandatory Inputs

- Repository root path
- Target Java version policy:
  - Prefer current LTS when not explicitly specified
  - If user explicitly requests latest GA non-LTS, use that instead

## Required Change Rules

1. Update `pom.xml` first:
   - `java.version`
   - `maven.compiler.source`
   - `maven.compiler.target`
   - `maven.compiler.release`
2. Keep plugin/dependency changes minimal unless build fails.
3. Update `HelloWorld.java` only if the current syntax/features are incompatible with the chosen Java version.
4. Do not refactor unrelated code.
5. Run build/test validation after edits.

## Validation Checklist

- `mvn -q -DskipTests compile` succeeds
- `mvn -q test` succeeds (if tests exist)
- No unrelated file churn

## Output Expectations

- Brief summary of files changed
- Exact Java version selected and why
- Any blockers (toolchain/auth/permissions)
